title: Registration completed successfully!
message:
Your data has been successfully registered. Your proposal will be reviewed, and soon we will announce the selected candidates for the PPGI selection process.
Click on the "Print Registration Form" link and print the page containing your registration details for your records. When requested, sign and submit this form to the PPGI/UFAM office located in the Department of Computer Science, at Gen. Rodrigo Octávio Jordão Ramos Street, 3000 NORTH SECTOR of the Manaus University Campus - AM - ZIP Code 69.077-00.
titleButtons: Click the icons below to view the respective documents.
